case_title: WONG, YEE WEN et al VS VEGA, REGINA MARIE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, REGINA MARIE
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED;TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 16 WORKING DAYS;MAILED COPIES TO ALL PARTIES TO FOLDER/DIANNE.
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION SCHEDULED HEARING COPIES MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, YEE WEN WONG, KIN SAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEGA, REGINA MARIE CASTRO, RONNIE A $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,610.00, UPON RECONSIDERATION, THE JUDGMENT OF JUNE 2, 2006 IS HEREBY VACATED, AND THIS NEW JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED BY THE CLERK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CASTRO, RONNIE A

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, REGINA MARIE CASTRO, RONNIE A THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN FULLY COMPENSATED FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE PURSUANT TO PREVIOUS SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT'S INSURER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION RECONSIDERATION:SCHEDULED FOR A HEARING. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, YEE WEN HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION RECONSIDERATION:SCHEDULED FOR A HEARING. OF DEC-07-2006, GRANTED
